items.name: 🌕The Eclipsed Sword Of Darkness🌑
items.description: The Eclipsed Sword of Darkness is a fearsome and elegant UGC sword that embodies the raw power of the void and the mystery of an eternal eclipse. The blade itself is a deep, shadowy black, with a faint, swirling pattern that seems to shift like a darkened nebula. Along its edge, a faint white glow pulses, as though the sword is alive with dark energy, waiting to be unleashed. The blade is thin but imposing, with an almost ethereal, jagged appearance as though it has been carved from the very fabric of night itself.
